This novel construct delivers a lower -profile, faster, and stronger repair compared to a traditional Krackow stitch. 7 The SutureTag suture has a 1.3 mm вАЬtagвАЭ that bifurcates into two #2 suture limbs for increased suture-to-tendon interface while compressing and tapering the tendon to reduce repair bulk. The 36.6 mm, ¬љ-circle tapered needle simplifies passage through both tendon and suture, enabling efficient, reproducible repairs. SutureTag, 1.3 mm, (white/blue/black), w/ needle (AR-7274TT) SutureTag, 1.3 mm, (white/black), w/ needle (AR-7274T) 12 | FiberWire¬Ѓ Sutures FiberLoop¬Ѓ and TigerLoopвДҐ Sutures Strengthen and Simplify Tendon Suturing Ideal for quick and easy whipstitches, both ends of FiberLoop and TigerLoop sutures are attached to a single needle to create a suture loop. This suture is available in #0, #2, and SutureTape and smaller 4-0 and 2-0 options. These small-diameter looped FiberWire ¬Ѓ sutures are perfect for strong multistrand flexor and extensor tendon repairs and help minimize tendon damage from multiple needle passes. #2 FiberLoop Suture, w/ straight needle 20 in, blue (AR-7234) FiberLoop with FiberTag Suture, w/ swaged straight needle (AR-7266) SutureTape FiberLoop, 1.3 mm, 20 in loop (white/blue) w/ 76 mm straight needle (AR-7534) Whipstitches created with FiberLoop suture FiberLoop with FiberTagвДҐ suture The SpeedWhipвДҐ rip-stop technique eliminates the weak link in graft preparation by reinforcing the suture-tissue interface with a FiberTag ¬Ѓ scaffold. Incorporate a FiberTag suture into the end of the FiberLoop construct to allow each needle pass to incorporate both the graft and the FiberTag scaffold. Compared to standard stitching alone, this construct has demonstrated increased strength. 8 FiberWire¬Ѓ Sutures | 13 Meniscus Repair Needles Solution for Inside-Out Meniscus Repair Stainless steel meniscus repair needles include a 0.9 mm, 38-inch Mini SutureTape, which provides broader compression than round suture. Perform standard inside-out meniscus repairs with all the benefits of FiberWire ¬Ѓ suture and SutureTape. FiberSnare¬Ѓ Suture Ideal for Shuttling Suture Through Bone Tunnels FiberSnare suture is #2 FiberWire suture with the first 12 inches stiffened for convenient, easy advancement through most cannulated instruments, alleviating the need for a monofilament suture or wire suture shuttle. FiberSnare suture features a small loop at one end for shuttling through bone tunnels and comes with a thin plastic tube that protects the stiffened suture until use. 2-0 FiberWire Meniscus Repair
